name: Baton Configuration Loader
description: Configuration loading for Baton. Reads baton.yaml from a project directory and produces a CircuitSpec. Supports both topology-first (baton.yaml nodes/edges) and service-first (baton-service.yaml manifests) workflows.

types.name: CircuitSpec
types.description: Schema object representing a circuit configuration from baton.schemas

types.name: NodeSpec
types.description: Schema object representing a node in the circuit from baton.schemas

types.name: EdgeSpec
types.description: Schema object representing an edge in the circuit from baton.schemas

functions.name: load_circuit
functions.description: Load CircuitSpec from baton.yaml in the given directory. Returns an empty CircuitSpec if the YAML file contains only null/empty content.

error_cases.name: file_not_found
error_cases.condition: baton.yaml does not exist in project_dir

error_cases.name: file_read_error
error_cases.condition: Cannot open or read the file

preconditions: project_dir must be a valid path
postconditions: Returns a CircuitSpec object parsed from YAML
Returns empty CircuitSpec() if YAML content is None

functions.name: save_circuit
functions.description: Save CircuitSpec to baton.yaml in the given directory. Serializes the CircuitSpec and writes it as YAML with no flow style and unsorted keys.

inputs.name: circuit
inputs.description: CircuitSpec object to serialize and save

inputs.name: project_dir
inputs.description: Directory where baton.yaml will be written

error_cases.name: file_write_error
error_cases.condition: Cannot write to the file or directory

error_cases.name: yaml_dump_error
error_cases.condition: Circuit data cannot be serialized to YAML

preconditions: project_dir must be a valid path
circuit must be a valid CircuitSpec object
postconditions: baton.yaml file is written to project_dir with serialized circuit data
YAML is formatted with default_flow_style=False and sort_keys=False

functions.name: load_circuit_from_services
functions.description: Derive CircuitSpec from service manifests. If service_dirs is None, discovers them from baton.yaml's 'services' key or by scanning subdirectories for baton-service.yaml files. Loads manifests and derives a circuit using the registry module.

inputs.name: service_dirs
inputs.description: Optional list of service directories; if None, auto-discovers

error_cases.name: yaml_parse_error
error_cases.condition: Cannot parse baton.yaml when reading circuit name

error_cases.name: manifest_load_error
error_cases.condition: load_manifests fails to load service manifests

preconditions: project_dir must be a valid path
If service_dirs is None, discoverable service directories must exist
postconditions: Returns CircuitSpec derived from service manifests
Circuit name is extracted from baton.yaml if it exists, otherwise defaults to 'default'
side_effects: Calls external functions load_manifests and derive_circuit from baton.registry
May read multiple service manifest files

functions.name: _discover_service_dirs
functions.description: Auto-discover service directories. First checks baton.yaml for a 'services' list of paths. Otherwise, scans immediate subdirectories for baton-service.yaml files.
preconditions: project_dir must be a Path object
postconditions: Returns list of Path objects for discovered service directories
Returns empty list if no services found
Service directories are sorted if discovered by scanning
side_effects: Iterates through subdirectories to check for baton-service.yaml

functions.name: add_service_path
functions.description: Add a service directory path to baton.yaml's services list. Reads existing config, appends service_path if not already present, and writes back to file.

error_cases.name: file_not_found
error_cases.condition: baton.yaml does not exist in project_dir

error_cases.name: file_write_error
error_cases.condition: Cannot write updated config back to file

postconditions: service_path is added to services list in baton.yaml if not already present
baton.yaml is updated with new services list
If service_path already exists in list, no duplicate is added

functions.name: _parse_circuit
functions.description: Parse raw YAML dict into CircuitSpec. Extracts nodes and edges from the dictionary and constructs NodeSpec and EdgeSpec objects.

error_cases.name: node_spec_error
error_cases.condition: Node data cannot be unpacked into NodeSpec

error_cases.name: edge_spec_error
error_cases.condition: Edge data cannot be unpacked into EdgeSpec

error_cases.name: circuit_spec_error
error_cases.condition: CircuitSpec constructor fails with provided data

postconditions: Returns CircuitSpec with parsed nodes and edges
name defaults to 'default' if not in raw dict
version defaults to 1 if not in raw dict
nodes and edges default to empty lists if not in raw dict

functions.name: _serialize_circuit
functions.description: Convert CircuitSpec to a YAML-serializable dict. Selectively includes fields based on non-default values (host != '127.0.0.1', proxy_mode != 'http', role != 'service', etc.).
preconditions: circuit must be a valid CircuitSpec object
postconditions: Returns dictionary with name and version always present
nodes list included if circuit.nodes is non-empty
edges list included if circuit.edges is non-empty
Node fields only included if they differ from defaults
Edge label only included if present
